ogTitle: Freshwater Point vs Friday Pocket: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Freshwater Point and Friday Pocket.
heading: Freshwater Point vs Friday Pocket — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Freshwater Point, Queensland and Friday Pocket, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Friday Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Freshwater Point (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Freshwater Point or Friday Pocket safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Freshwater Point has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Friday Pocket scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Freshwater Point scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Friday Pocket scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Freshwater Point or Friday Pocket?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Friday Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
